nodes.label: Tomorrowland Logo — Cyber Bike SVG
nodes.description: 40x40 SVG logo for the Tomorrowland application. Cyberpunk/synthwave design style on a deep navy-black rounded-rectangle background (#060c1a). Features a neon cyan (#00e5ff) glowing bicycle rendered in full diamond-frame detail with rear and front wheels (each with 6 spokes and hub dots), seat tube, top tube, down tube, seat stays, chain stays, head tube, fork, handlebar with drop bar, saddle, dashed chainring, and pedal crank indicator. Decorative elements include a subtle dark-blue grid overlay, horizontal scanline stripes at low opacity, and HUD-style corner bracket markers in neon cyan with soft glow — all reinforcing a retro-futuristic heads-up-display aesthetic. Neon glow achieved via feGaussianBlur SVG filter composited over source graphic.
nodes.brand_element: bicycle (cycle/bike motif as core logo icon)
